title: Redamancy 2 PCS Sink Unblocker Cleaning Brush, 60 cm Sink Unblocker Brush, Drain Unblocker Set, Plughole Unblocker, Bathroom Pipe Unblocker, Hair Cleaner for Toilet Bathroom Kitchen Sewer
features: Package Content : You will get 2 pieces of sewer hair cleaner, dredge length: 60cm(23.6 in). It can easily help you to unblocker your pipes, clean out the trash, hair and other obstructions in the water pipes. Suitable for you to clean the drain hole regularly to prevent clogging

High Quality : The drain cleaning brush set is made of excellent stainless steel and nylon material, which is strong and durable for long-term use, can be bent and not easily deformed, and is resistant to corrosion and rust, regularly keeping sinks and basins clear

Well-Made : Our sewer hair cleaner is made of high-quality metal and nylon brushes. Pipe dredge is strong and not easy to break, anti-corrosion and rust-proof, and can be reused. The swivel design of the brush makes it easy to access hard-to-reach spaces for cleaning

Easy To Use : Insert the sink unblocker tool into plug hole, and slightly turn to grab hairs and gunk, then slowly pull out. Just wiped firmly with kitchen roll and gave it a rinse to get rid of the remaining gunk, an effective tool for cleaning drains

Wide Application : Drainage dredge is not only suitable for cleaning kitchen sinks, but also for kitchen sewer pipes, bathroom floor drains, bathtub drain holes, washbasin sinks, refrigerator drains, etc. Drain holes throughout your home need to be unclogged and cleaned regularly to prevent blockages
description: Product Description Redamancy Flexible Feeding Tube Cleaning Brush for Bathroom Sink Shower Plug Holes - Material: Stainless Steel , Nylon Size: Sink unclogging brush: 60cm/23.6 inches Package includes：2 * Sink unclogging brush 1.Made of sturdy stainless steel and nylon bristles, the bristles adopt a rotating design that can help you easily clean your hair and dirt. 2. When you are not using it, you can hang it in a ventilated place, it will not take up a lot of your space, and it is convenient to store. 3.This pipe cleaners plumbing is easy to use and reusable to meet your drain cleaning needs. 4.The drain pipe cleaner has double-ended nylon bristles, which are soft and elastic, will not cause scratches on the surface of the object. 5.Effectively removes hair, soap, food and other impurities without the use of chemical solutions, easily and efficiently removes all accumulated debris and avoids environmental pollution.
